title: Loop won't stop + silent save-loss desyncs project.json (post-208/213 refactor)
description: Two bugs surfaced live during a Loop-driven t2i batch (Rossifi project, 2026-07-08). (1) LOOP WON'T STOP: pressing Stop mid-loop did not disarm the loop — it kept re-firing gens; user could not stop it. Suspect the generationStore lane-drain re-fire (_loopCallbacks, generationStore.js:242-249) firing after Stop and/or state.loopArmed not cleared on Stop. (2) SILENT SAVE-LOSS / project.json DESYNC: media PNGs wrote to disk (t2i_001-005, 14:35-14:38) but project.json stopped persisting after 13:41 and only 1 of ~8 gens registered. save-generation failures are caught+swallowed as a warn (generationService.js:923-925) so the flow continues with the item ONLY in renderer memory — no sidecar on disk. On reload, stale project.json loads 1 item and projectReconciler.js:121 fires load-meta for the memory-only ghost ids -> 404s (seen in console). Root is in the MPI-208/213 generationStore/queue refactor + the swallowed-save path, NOT MPI-225 (proven: projects.js server edit never ran (no restart); the MPI-225 generationService filter is pure/post-save/metadata-only; promptReuse is read-path only). NO DATA LOST on disk in this incident; the desync is a persistence/registration bug.
